---
name: Feature / improvement request
about: Suggest new content, a new template, a new checklist, or an improvement to existing material.
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or motivation

<!--
What is missing or wrong today? Be specific.
"The repo has no template for X, so I had to improvise" is useful.
"The repo could be better" is not.
-->

## Proposed change

<!--
What would you add or change? Where would it live in the repo?
Reference the file map in README.md if helpful (e.g. "a new file under templates/").
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What else did you think about? Why does your proposal beat the alternatives?
If you considered not doing anything, say why that's not good enough.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Anything else that helps: links to prior art, examples from other repos, a rough draft,
or a specific scenario where this would have helped.
-->
